day_1: Learned about the difference between DevOps and AI Automation. Set up Gemini API.
day_2: Mastered Git configuration, commit amending, and securing secrets with .gitignore.
day_3: Built a Python-based RSS news aggregator and connected it to the LinkedIn API.
day_4: Automated memory using a history.txt file and deployed to GitHub Actions cloud.
day_5: Learned about LLM Hallucinations and how to use System Instructions to force specific output styles.
